description: Establish a performance baseline for the OpenICE platform under load. Create two simulated device adapters of different types in the OpenICE Supervisor and measure the OpenICE Java process's heap memory usage (Used/Max in MB), CPU usage percentage, and thread count using Linux command-line tools. Document the results in a performance report at /home/ga/Desktop/performance_baseline.txt. The report must include the names of the device types, the specific numeric values measured (with units), the exact commands used to collect the data, and a brief hardware sizing recommendation based on the metrics.
